project_type.name: Product Discovery Project
project_type.description: A project type that turns a brief into an approved PRD and a wireframe using AI work plus human feedback and review.

roles.description: Human owner who provides the initial brief, gives feedback, and approves outputs.
roles.default_prompt: You are the project owner. Provide concrete direction and apply judgment when giving feedback or approval.

roles.description: Agent that drafts and revises product requirements.
roles.default_prompt: You are a senior product manager. Produce clear, actionable product requirements.

roles.description: Agent that turns approved requirements into wireframes.
roles.default_prompt: You are a senior product designer. Produce low-fidelity wireframes that match the approved requirements.

artifacts.description: Initial project brief shared across the project type

workflow_types.description: Capture a brief, iterate on a PRD with feedback, approve it, and create a wireframe.

artifacts.description: Workflow-local feedback captured from feedback or review nodes
Approved wireframe output for the workflow

nodes.title: Provide Brief
nodes.description: Capture the initial brief for the project.
nodes.prompt: Write a concise brief covering the problem, target users, constraints, and success criteria.

nodes.title: Draft PRD
nodes.description: Produce the first PRD draft from the brief.
nodes.prompt: Turn the brief into a PRD with scope, requirements, and acceptance criteria.

nodes.title: Collect Human Feedback
nodes.description: Capture human commentary on the drafted PRD before formal approval.
nodes.prompt: Provide concrete feedback on what should change in the PRD before approval.

nodes.title: Revise PRD
nodes.description: Revise the PRD using the collected human feedback.
nodes.prompt: Update the PRD so that it fully addresses the human feedback while preserving clear scope and requirements.

nodes.title: Approve PRD
nodes.description: Approve the revised PRD or send it back for another revision.
nodes.prompt: Approve only when the PRD is ready to drive design work; otherwise request revision with concrete guidance.

nodes.title: Create Wireframe
nodes.description: Create a wireframe from the approved PRD.
nodes.prompt: Produce a low-fidelity wireframe that reflects the approved PRD.

artifacts.description: Node-local preview image kept only for this node
